title: The Ultimate CIT Resource Pack
description: This is the Ultimate CIT Resource Pack, adding dozens of new items, armors, and weapons to the game via Custom Item Textures!
body:
This is the Ultimate CIT Resource Pack. It adds a whole treasure trove of new armors and weapons to Minecraft.



**What's CIT?**
﻿
Custom Item Textures, CIT for short, are textures that Utilize Optifine (Or, for Fabric players, CIT Resewn) to create entirely new weapons based around NBT tags such as names. This resource pack deals with exclusively names.

**But how do I use it?**

Naming something such as a Netherite or Diamond sword to "Master Sword" will give it a new texture, in that specific instance, the texture of the Master Sword.

**Does this change any of the base textures?**

No, none at all. You could play with this texture pack and only ever notice a difference should you choose to make a custom item.

**Will other people see it?**

Only if they have the resource pack applied.

**What kind of new weapons/armors are there?**

Full list here: [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/19jDpJ-FyLIs4BazZyJVJ_i8l9QX0su6dasTjs3JGtFo/edit?usp=sharing 'Google Doc with full list')

**What's with the coins and sodas and stuff?**

That's for a Minecraft server I run that utilizes this resource pack. It seems scummy to plug it here, so I won't! Use those textures however you want!

Thanks to StephanJ2_ for making [BetterVanillaBuilding](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettervanillabuilding 'Better Vanilla Building') which gave me the idea to make this. Thanks!

*Last Update: v2.3, 11/9/2023.*
